commandsRun: JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17 ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/root/Android/Sdk PATH=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools:/root/Android/Sdk/emulator:$PATH adb -s emulator-5554 shell getprop sys.boot_completed

JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17 ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/root/Android/Sdk PATH=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools:/root/Android/Sdk/emulator:$PATH adb -s emulator-5554 shell 'toybox nc -z 10.0.2.2 3122 && echo emulator_fixture_port_open'

JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17 ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/root/Android/Sdk PATH=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools:/root/Android/Sdk/emulator:$PATH adb -s emulator-5554 exec-out screencap -p > <evidence png>

cd /root/workspace/github/jtsang4/aterm && (JAVA_HOME=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17 ANDROID_SDK_ROOT=/root/Android/Sdk PATH=/root/.local/share/aterm-jdk-17/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/cmdline-tools/latest/bin:/root/Android/Sdk/platform-tools:/root/Android/Sdk/emulator:$PATH ./gradlew :app:connectedDebugAndroidTest -Pandroid.testInstrumentationRunnerArguments.class=io.github.jtsang4.aterm.SnippetRealFixtureExecutionInstrumentedTest#saved_host_execution_uses_the_selected_fixture_host_and_preserves_multiline_order --max-workers=1 > VAL-SNIPPET-009-capture-gradle.log 2>&1 & pid=$!; for i in 01 02 03 04 05 06 07 08; do sleep 2; adb -s emulator-5554 exec-out screencap -p > VAL-SNIPPET-009-shot-${i}.png; done; wait $pid)

assertionsTested.title: Canceling execution confirmation dispatches nothing and creates no successful-run record
assertionsTested.observed: Canceled confirmation returned to snippets, emitted no execution notice, left transcript without CANCEL_SHOULD_NOT_RUN, and kept execution history size at 0.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed; only normal instrumentation/system noise in run output.
evidence.network: Real SSH fixture reachable at 10.0.2.2:3122 before test; test itself proved no dispatch occurred.

assertionsTested.title: Confirmed execution against a selected host runs on that host and preserves multiline order
assertionsTested.observed: Saved-host execution switched the active host to the selected fixture host and verified ordered transcript output for SELECTED_HOST_LINE_1/2/3, with history labeled Saved host: Selected fixture host.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app errors surfaced; captured logcat contains instrumentation and system noise only.
evidence.network: Fixture-backed dispatch to 10.0.2.2:3122 verified by passing instrumentation assertions on selected-host transcript order.

assertionsTested.title: Confirmed execution in the current active session reuses that session instead of opening an unrelated one
assertionsTested.observed: Snippet execution reused the existing active session and produced one ACTIVE_SESSION_REUSE_PROOF line in the same transcript without changing the active host.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during combined active-session run.
evidence.network: Real SSH fixture at 10.0.2.2:3122 exercised through existing session reuse path.

assertionsTested.title: Active-session targeting refreshes when the live session changes or disappears
assertionsTested.observed: After disconnect, the snippet surface showed a stale-session warning; after reconnect, the target refreshed back to the actual live session and execution succeeded there.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during combined active-session run.
evidence.network: Fixture-backed reconnect and follow-up execution against 10.0.2.2:3122 passed.

assertionsTested.title: Repeated taps on run or confirm create only one execution
assertionsTested.observed: Two confirm tap attempts still yielded exactly one ACTIVE_SESSION_REUSE_PROOF output line and one history entry.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during combined active-session run.
evidence.network: Only one fixture-backed dispatch reached 10.0.2.2:3122 per instrumentation assertions.

assertionsTested.title: Failed snippet dispatch does not appear as a successful recent run
assertionsTested.observed: Wrong-password saved-host dispatch surfaced authentication failure and recorded no success history; a separate proven-success run recorded exactly one successful history item with payload proof.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during failure/success comparison flow.
evidence.network: Comparison exercised real auth failure and real successful payload dispatch against fixture endpoint 10.0.2.2:3122.

assertionsTested.title: Successful executions appear in recent history with recency order and target context
assertionsTested.observed: Two proven executions with the same title but different targets produced newest-first history ordering, with Beta fixture host first and Alpha fixture host second, each labeled with saved-host context.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during recency-order run.
evidence.network: Two successful fixture-backed snippet dispatches to 10.0.2.2:3122 verified recent-history ordering.

assertionsTested.title: Recent execution history survives app relaunch, uses the latest saved snippet content, and stays non-broken after deletion
assertionsTested.observed: Edited snippet content previewed and executed as LATEST_HISTORY_CONTENT_PROOF, remained coherent after background/resume, and after deletion history stayed visible as Snippet deleted with no runnable edit path.

evidence.consoleErrors: No unexpected app crash/error observed during relaunch/deletion flow.
evidence.network: Latest-content execution was proven against real fixture endpoint 10.0.2.2:3122 before relaunch/deletion checks.

summary.result: All assigned snippet rerun assertions passed on emulator-5554 against the real SSH fixture surface.

frictions.description: External adb screencap taken after instrumentation teardown captured the launcher rather than the in-app snippet UI.
frictions.resolution: Used instrumentation logs, UTP artifacts, and pass/fail assertions as the primary proof source while still preserving the captured PNGs under the assigned evidence directory.
